growth_records.medium: Unamended 0.6 um-filtered natural seawater (dissolved organic matter), virus-reduced by dilution
growth_records.cite: Long et al. Benchmarking microbial growth rate predictions from metagenomes. ISME J (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-020-00773-1. [PMC7852909]
growth_records.snippet: SAR86 MAGs also had a low range of both observed (0.53-1.84 per day) and predicted (0.64-1.82 per day) maximum growth rates.
growth_records.notes: Observed growth range 0.53-1.84 per day. Converted per-day to per-h by /24: max 1.84/24=0.07667 h^-1 (recorded), min 0.53/24=0.02208 h^-1. Doubling time = ln2/0.07667 = 9.04 h. Overall study range across all 101 MAGs was 0.08-5.99 per day.
